name: taruvi-refine-template
postCreateCommand: bash -lc '[ -f .mcp.json ] || cp .mcp.example.json .mcp.json; [ -f .env ] || cp .env.example .env; mkdir -p .codex/projects; source /usr/local/share/nvm/nvm.sh; nvm install 22; nvm use 22; npm install; command -v codex >/dev/null 2>&1 || npm install -g @openai/codex'

postAttachCommand.app: bash -lc 'source /usr/local/share/nvm/nvm.sh; nvm install 22; nvm use 22; [ -d node_modules ] || npm install; npm run dev -- --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5173'
postAttachCommand.codex: bash -lc 'source /usr/local/share/nvm/nvm.sh; nvm install 22; nvm use 22; command -v codex >/dev/null 2>&1 || npm install -g @openai/codex; [ -f .env ] || cp .env.example .env; while true; do set -a && source .env && set +a; MISSING_VARS=""; for VAR_NAME in VITE_TARUVI_BASE_URL VITE_TARUVI_API_KEY VITE_TARUVI_APP_SLUG; do VAR_VALUE=$(printenv "$VAR_NAME"); if [ -z "${VAR_VALUE//[[:space:]]/}" ]; then MISSING_VARS="$MISSING_VARS $VAR_NAME"; fi; done; if [ -z "$MISSING_VARS" ]; then break; fi; echo "Missing required .env values:$MISSING_VARS"; echo "Populate .env, then press Enter to continue."; read -r; done; export TARUVI_AUTH_HEADER="Api-Key $VITE_TARUVI_API_KEY"; bash scripts/setup-codex-config.sh; export CODEX_HOME=${CODEX_HOME:-$PWD/.codex}; mkdir -p "$CODEX_HOME/projects"; AUTH_PATH=project-code/.codex/auth.json; if [ ! -f "$AUTH_PATH" ]; then echo "please copy auth.json to $AUTH_PATH and press Enter"; read -r; fi; codex --sandbox danger-full-access'
